meta.author: Nino Chavez
meta.notes: v2 candidate forked from v1 preset under provisional D1=Thesis A (per blueprint/prescription.yml). Identity updated to reflect architect-who-directs-agents reframe + D2 candidate tagline + research-derived audience. Palette / typography / voice carry from v1 under D5=no-delta default.

identity.name: Signal Dispatch
identity.tagline: Working notes from an architect who directs agents to ship commerce.
identity.mission: Make agent-assisted production work — chassis, contracts, validators, and the hiring-evaluator-safe artifacts that prove the work is real — legible to peer architects and the directors who hire them.
audience: peer architects (P1) — looking for working patterns + peer reads on industry arguments + reference architectures to cite
hiring evaluators (P2) — directors and principals testing whether the architect-who-directs-agents positioning is backed by receipts
AI-curious staff ICs (P3) — search-arriving practitioners trying to figure out how AI fits their own work
identity.positioning: A working architect's notes on directing agents in high-stakes production work — practice, not personal brand

attributes.example: But wait — is that actually true, or is it just what we've been told?
The cache invalidation problem isn't technical — it's organizational.

attributes.description: Opens with uncomfortable truths or counterintuitive claims
attributes.example: Most platform teams exist to justify headcount, not serve developers.

attributes.description: Reads like talking to a smart colleague at a bar
attributes.example: Look, I've built three of these. The third one was worse than the first.

attributes.description: Holds ideas tentatively, signals epistemic humility
attributes.example: This might be wrong, but the pattern I keep seeing is...

antiPatterns.suggestion: Say the actual thing. 'Use' not 'leverage'. 'Examine' not 'deep dive'.
Write in first person. 'I think' not 'It can be observed'.
Offer perspective, not prescriptions. 'What's worked for me' not 'you must'.

structuralPatterns.name: question-first-opening
structuralPatterns.description: Open with a question that frames the tension
structuralPatterns.example: What happens when the tool you built to save time starts costing more than it saves?

structuralPatterns.name: evolution-not-revolution
structuralPatterns.description: Track how thinking changed over time, not just the endpoint

structuralPatterns.name: compare-contrast
structuralPatterns.description: Place two approaches side by side and examine tradeoffs

structuralPatterns.name: provisional-thinking
structuralPatterns.description: Signal when ideas are tentative vs confident

examples.good: I keep seeing teams build internal developer platforms that nobody uses. The pattern is always the same: someone reads a Gartner report, gets budget, hires 12 people, and ships a portal that developers route around.
examples.bad: In this comprehensive analysis, we will examine the emerging paradigm of internal developer platforms and their transformative impact on engineering velocity.

examples.good: Start with a Makefile. Seriously. Before you build a platform, put your common commands in a Makefile and see if that's enough. It usually is.
examples.bad: Organizations should holistically evaluate their developer experience maturity before leveraging platform engineering as a strategic capability.

creative.basePrompt:
BRAND: Signal Dispatch — a publication of working notes from an architect who directs agents to ship commerce. Editorial, not personal-brand. Practice, not promotion. Reads as professional studio output, not as marketing.
AESTHETIC: Dark, deliberate, technical. Minimalist with editorial gravity. Editorial-publication register, not SaaS-startup register, not personal-brand register.

VISUAL LANGUAGE:
- Signal waveforms, circuit-like patterns, geometric nodes — but as editorial illustration, not infographics
- Abstract data visualization, flowing lines, technical artifacts
- Architectural diagrams, drafted-by-hand feel, blueprint-adjacent
- Near-black backgrounds with coral/cyan accent highlights
- Clean lines, no ornamental flourishes, no startup-y gradients

conceptMap.signal: abstract signal waveform, frequency pattern, data stream
conceptMap.network: network topology nodes and edges, connected systems
conceptMap.circuit: circuit board patterns, technical traces, PCB aesthetic
conceptMap.data: data visualization, flowing lines, abstract charts
conceptMap.grid: subtle background grid, technical graph paper
conceptMap.agent: geometric figure directing a swarm of smaller geometric figures — author-as-director metaphor
conceptMap.harness: structural scaffolding, contracts, validators — the safety frame around autonomous action
conceptMap.architecture: blueprint-style line drawings, isometric structural diagrams

formatModifiers.og-card: Open Graph card. 1200x630px. Single dominant illustration, room for overlaid title.
formatModifiers.hero: Post hero image. 1600x900px. Editorial illustration register.
